p.em: ELF Object File → Parsed Sections → Merged Output

ol.li: Every allocatable input section maps to exactly one output section
Mapping table is complete before M2/M3 run

div.p: sh_type != SHT_NULL AND sh_flags & SHF_ALLOC AND sh_addralign is power-of-2
Critical for Relocation Maps (file, section, offset) → output offset Used by M3 to translate relocation sites
Central State Owned by main(), passed to all phases

c calc_padding(current, align): if align <= 1: return 0 rem = current % align return rem ? align - rem : 0 align_up(value, align): if align <= 1: return value return (value + align - 1) & ~(align - 1)

ol.li: Sections grouped by name across all inputs
MappingTable enables O(1) lookup for relocation
